final_choice.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Operating Activities

variables.notes: R:nc. Best semantic match for operating cash flow. Manual review needed because the same row label appears twice in the cash flow sheet with different values, and row-label-only mapping cannot distinguish between the duplicates.
